titleStmt.title: SII 41.64: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 64. (A.R. No. 63 of 1905.) Āṉaimalai, Madurai Taluk, Madurai District. On a rock to the left of the entrance into the central shrine of the rock-cut temple of Narasinga-Perumal

p.hi: Chōḻa, Madiraikoṇḍa Parakēsarivarmaṉ, Parānthaka I, Year 33 = 940 A.D.

summary.p: In Vatteluttu characters. Records the digging of a tank called Kaliyanēri after the donor Arunidi-Kaliyaṉ, an officer of the king. Refers to Kīḻ-Iraniyamuṭṭam and the village of Narasiṅgamaṅgalam included in it; also to the temple of Narasiṅga Perumānaḍigaḷ on the Tiruvānaimalai hill.
(Published in South Indian Inscriptions, Vol. III, No. 106.)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . matiraikoṇṭa kOpparakEcari paṉmaṟku yāṇṭu muppattu muṉṟāvatu Ivvāṇṭu tEvatāṉaṅ kiḻiraṇiya muṭṭattup paṭum pi
rammatēyam naraciṅkamaṅkalattuc cavaiyōmñ cōḻapperumāṉaṭikaḷatikārikaḷ cōḻanāṭṭu puṟaṅkarampai
marutūr marutūruṭaiyāṉaruṇiti kaliyaṉukku Oṭṭik kuṭutta paricāvatu Eṅkaḷūrt tiruvāṉaimalai naraciṅkap perumāṉaṭikaḷ ta
muṭaiya nilattālc cavaiyomukku Āṇṭeṭuttu Iṭakkaṭava Īḻakkācu patiṉeṭṭum Ikkācu patiṉeṭṭilum muṉṟat toṉṟu Ī
ḻakkācu Āṟu Ivvāṟu Īḻakkācukkum palicaiyākac cavaiyār kaiyvaḻi kuṭutta Īḻakkācu patiṉaiṉtu pati ñciṉaiñciṉālum vanta pali
caiyāvatu Īḻakkāciṉ vāyttiṅkaḷ kāṟputtakkamāka Oro tiṅkaḷāl vanta puttakkam mūṉṟe mukkāl muṉṟe mukkālu Ōrāṇṭu panniraṇṭu ti
ṅkaḷāl vanta puttakkam nāṟpattaiñcu nāṟpattaiñciṉāloru Īḻakkācu Āṟu Ivvāṟu Īḻa
kkācum Iṟai nikkit tevar cavaiyārkku Iṭakkaṭava kācu 10 2paṉṉiraṇṭum nīkki Atikārikaḷ marutūruṭaiyāṉ Aruṇiti kaliyaṉ Iṟaikāvalāka kātta
kāciṉāl vanta nilaṉ Ūruṭaiyāṉ kuḷamāṉa kaliyaṉeriyum Ikkuḷantāveṇṭumāṟu kallik karai niḷam Aṭṭappeṟuvatākavum I
kkuḷaṅkarai Ucara Aṭṭappeṟuvatākavum Ikkuḷattiṉir tāṉ veṇṭu Aḷavuṅkokkap peṟuvatākavumikkuḷam Itiṉ kiḻ nirnilaṉiru ve
liyu marutūruṭaiyāṉaruṇiti kaliyaṉ vilaikkuk koṇṭu Ikkuḷattiṉ kiḻ nir nilaṉiruveliyiṉāl vanta pokam Aññāḻikkālāl nellu 3 100 kalam
Ivaiyiṟṟiṉ pāti 100 5 10 nelluṅ koṇṭu Ivarkku mūṉṟu cantiyun tiruvamirtu cevatākavum niṉṟa 1[5 10] nelluṅ koṇṭu tiruvamitu U
ttama Akkiramākat tevar Amitu ceyyum poḻutu vetappirāmaṇar nicatam Ayvar Amitu ceyvatākavum vaccapaṭi patteṭṭukkuttal Oruvaṉu
kku Arici Irunāḻiyuṅ kaṟimūṉṟum tayir nāḻiyum neyiru ceviṭum kāyyilai Iraṇṭum tālamañcum vaṭṭilaiñcum Oṭṭuṭṭi Oṉṟu
m caṭṭuvam Oṉṟu Aṭuvā(ṉ)ṉoruvaṉukku nicati nellu Aññāḻi Aṟu tiṅkaḷoru puṭavai vaiccu Ipparicu Ikkalamuṭṭuvatāka Iv
vāṭṭai kaṟkaṭaka nāyiṟṟu veḷḷikkiḻamai peṟṟa Āyileyattiṉāṉṟu cū(ṟ)ṟiyak kiraṇavelaikkuraikirāṇam paṟṟiṉa Aṉṟu mutalāka Ikkalam
Ipparicey Ūṭṭuvatāka niṉṟu ciṟikāṟiyamārāykiṉṟa tiruvāyppāṭi nārāyaṇaṉum Ivvūrc cavaiyārum Ipparicey Akkiramuṭṭāmey cantirā
tittavalum Ūṭṭuvippomāṉom tiruvāṉaimalai naraciṅkapperumāṉaṭikaḷukku cirikācciya Ārāyvārum cavayōmum Itiṟṟirampiṉomaic cavaiy
yālum cirikā(ṟ)ṟiyamārāyvāṉun tiṟamiṉāṉ nicati Irukācu Aṉṟāḻ koviṉukkut taṇṭampaṭṭu Akkācu koṇṭu tevarkkut tiruviḷakku Erivatākavum cavaiyār
ttiṟampil Āṟukācu taṇṭappaṭuvatākavum Oṭṭik kuṭuttom cavaiyomum ciri kāriyamārāyvāṉum marutūruṭaiyāṉaruṇitikaliyaṉukku Ittaṇṭa miṟu
ttu mittaṉmam muṭṭāme Ayvaraiyum cantirāticcar Uḷḷaḷavum Ūṭṭuvippomāṉoñ cavayyum cirikārcciyam Ārāyum vayiṣṇavarum Itaṉ
mamrakṣittāṉ ..
Digital edition of SII 41.64 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
